_comment: Live loop state. The PM updates this at the end of every tick. Survives context resets. Keep this file SMALL: state values + short pointers only — narrative belongs in state/PROGRESS.md (cockpit) and state/journal.md (archive). Do not re-grow _state_reason/_paused_reason blobs here; a stale blob once carried a superseded channel rule (removed 2026-07-19).
project: (none — engine improvement; touchRPG paused 2026-07-19, lifetown paused 2026-07-17)
_paused_note: Set paused:true to make the loop go straight back to sleep without doing work. The kill switch — the user can stop the team without stopping the loop itself. Current state + resume pointers: state/PROGRESS.md.
_escalations_note: Tasks the quality loop could not pass within its round budget. The PM must surface these to the user rather than let them silently look done.
